name: Casey B.
text: I always know that I can count on the team at Target Roofing! Casey, Trey, and Shannon are all great people to have representing the company in the community and are always good for a friendly smile and a warm 'Hello'. More specifically, I always give Trey's information whenever I hear someone in need of a roof repair. Unfortunately, my own office needed some repair after heavy SWFL rains. I was more than confident giving my office manager his number and Trey was more than accommodating in getting us an estimate and the roof at our office repaired. Thank you to everyone who made it happen!

name: Jessica C.
text: We use this company for most of the properties we manage in the Fort Myers Area. With the prestigious service and timely manner they provide for us and our tenants, we couldn't be more happy to have and refer them.

name: Katie Edmunds
text: Having worked with other, well-known roofing companies around SWFL, Target Roofing is, by far, second to none. Every stage of the process was seamless and professional. I was extremely impressed by how detailed and organized my estimate was. Also, the Target Roofing staff was prompt with communication, skilled in customer service, and got the job done quick. I highly recommend Target Roofing for residential or commercial needs.

name: Laurie H
text: Wow so impressed by Target Roofing and all of their staff! Such a great company to work with. Anytime we ever need a roofing Company again, will definitely be calling on them and referring everyone we know to them as well!

name: Orlando C.
text: Great overall service and product. I was absolutely blown away by the professionalism exhibited by their employee Trevor Hume, who would bend over backwards to cater to all my needs. Highly recommend their services.

name: Senior XD
text: This is an awesome Local Company that does real good quality work. The staff are very friendly and I got to give a big thumbs up to Tina because she was very easy to work with.

name: Alex P.
text: Target Roofing and Sheet Metal did an amazing job on my roof and the service is incredible, the man who assisted me, Trevor Hume, truly was amazing and kept me up with everything. Simply 5/5 service, you will not regret hiring them.

name: Danielle Beach
text: Target Roofing does great work, gives back to the community, and is run by great people!

name: Nicole A.
text: Such friendly and accommodating workers! The service was incredible and the detail was fantastic. I will absolutely use this company again!

name: Omar A.
text: I want to say thank you to Target Roofing! And a bigger thanks to Trey! He was the flashlight I was in need of while I was lost in the dark. He was able to answer all of my questions whenever I had one. A great professional company that treated me like I was family. Thank guys. I wish I needed another roof just so I had a reason to talk to Trey.

name: Michael D.
text: Great overall service and product. I was absolutely blown away by the professionalism exhibited by their employee Trevor Yume, who would bend over backwards to cater to all my needs. Highly recommend their services.

name: Stationagent Jules
text: Great service. Office staff was very helpful especially Kim.

name: John
text: Target roofing was on time and on point with the service work there performed at my residence! If you need any service work or re-roof work done there the only choice!

name: Kaleb Gerald
text: Target Roofing offers great quality service at a great price !!

name: Backyard Builders
text: Matt is fantastic. Had Target help us out in a pinch when I couldn't get anyone else to assist. Will definitely be utilizing Target Roofing more based on the customer service

name: Lee Wood
text: Work with Matt at this place!!! They got you covered for all your roofing needs. Bullseye with Target and Matt O!!!!!

name: Arturo De los Reyes Gavilan
text: Target Roofing was professional, efficient, and reliable. They provided clear recommendations, completed the job quickly, and left my property clean. The team was easy to communicate with, and the pricing was fair. Highly recommend their services!

name: Bill Roberts
text: Amazing service! I contacted them after seeing what damage hurricane had done to my roof and Target Roofing was out to get to work on it the following day. Great service, customer service. Highly recommended!

name: Kathy Biggs
text: Target Roofing has been very prompt in responding and scheduling.

name: Dayan Delgado
text: At the moment I needed a roofing company the most, one that offered the best price to redo my roof, I found them. I would hire them again without hesitation. They worked quickly, delivered quality results, and kept me updated at all times. Even when I wasn't home, I knew exactly what they were doing. They truly have an excellent team.

name: Kaitlyn Karpuszka
text: Great experience and great people! Was extremely helpful through the process! 10/10! Got recommended tremendously by Matt O'Berski and loved it!

name: Amy Blocker
text: Target Roofing should be your first choice for a roofing company. They are very professional, knowledgeable and their work speaks for itself. Great company.

name: Walter Doran
text: Excellent service and quality ...no job too big handles our condo association to complete satisfaction

name: Joel Francis Rico
text: Spoke with Brent, very professional great to work with! Highly recommended!

name: Damon Daniels
text: Excellent job. Highly recommended!

name: Brandi Haas
text: I had an amazing experience with Target Roofing. From start to finish, the team was professional, responsive, and made the entire process stress-free. You can tell their marketing and communication are top-notch; everything was clearly …

name: John Sherwood
text: I called Target Roofing and spoke with Erik, and he was great. Super friendly, helpful, and answered all my questions without rushing me. He made everything easy to understand and really took his time. …

name: Bill Smith
text: We recently worked with Target Roofing, and I couldn’t be happier with the entire experience. From start to finish, their team was professional, responsive, and incredibly knowledgeable. …

name: Leslie Ballard
text: We had an excellent experience with Target Roofing! Fair price, great communication, knowledgeable and hard working employees. Highly Recommend! …

name: Sam Kaplan
text: Thank you, Target Roofing, for the great work on all of my roofing projects. You have done reroofs, maintenance, and emergency repairs for myself and my businesses, and I can not say thank you enough. Your entire team is responsive and …

name: Bernita Esprit
text: I had the pleasure of working with Brent from Target Roofing, and I can’t say enough great things about him. He was professional, knowledgeable, and went above and beyond to make sure everything was handled efficiently and with care. His …

name: Fekel Altimeaux
text: Dealing with Matt And the Target Team really makes you wonder why anyone would choose another roofer! We were able to refer a commercial property manager on Pelican Bay to their team, and she’s let me know she’ll never work with another …

name: Kathy Popescu
text: Had a great experience with Target Roofing!Matt was awesome—super professional, easy to work with, and brought a great attitude to the job. Highly recommend! …

name: Vane Depaz
text: We were very lucky to get Erik as our rep. From the first day to the last he was very pleasant to deal with. He made sure we felt at ease with all our questions & concerns. He is very thorough, patient, knowledgeable, & professional, he’s a great asset to the company and will recommend him.
